series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: General-Handicapped/Disabilities; Blindness-General; Fund raising; Foundations General & Specific; Grants - General & Specific; Education; SCA - General & Specific; RRS - General; Directories; Product Literature; Studies, Statistics, Surveys, etc.; Reference Circulars from the National Library Service for the Blind and Physically Handicapped.
